failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS publication_id,
  p.description
FROM publication p
WHERE p.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'restaurant & wednesday')
ORDER BY ts_rank(p.description_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'restaurant & wednesday')) DESC
LIMIT 10;
